name: Aether
description: Aether effects and damage cannot be defended against with Resist Physical, Resist Magic, Resist Toxin, or Dodge.

name: Aura
description: Character may swing the specified type as their damage type

name: Breach Armor
description: Target's armor is reduced to 0.

name: Corrosive
description: Target's armor and weapons used in this encountered are affected by a Destroy effect.

name: Critical Ability
description: See [[Critical Ability]]

name: Damage Cap
description: All incoming damage is reduced to X.

name: Harmed By
description: Instead of suffering the named effect, the character takes damage when affected. If no number is specified, then the damage is the level of the spell or ability times ten.

name: Harmed Double
description: Character takes twice the stated damage from named type or effect

name: Gaseous Form
description: Character goes into a gaseous state by crossing their arms or weapons over their chest. While gaseous, the character cannot use any game skills or abilities, speak, communicate, or interact with any objects or people in the world, and is immune to all game effects except [[Solidify]]. Uncrossing their arms or being Solidified will cause the character to solidify on a 3-count. While solidifying, the character may not use any game skills or abilities, but is no longer granted immunity.

name: Healed By
description: Character is healed by x type/effect.

name: Immunity
description: Character immune to x effect for y time.

name: Incorporeal
description:
The character gains a free Additional Defense Slot that may only be used for Resist Physical. 
The character must concentrate for 3 seconds to physically interact with any physical objects. This does not apply to weapon blows, physical abilities, or performing First Aid.

name: Infect
description: Target becomings infected. Plot-specific ability.

name: Magic Deliverance
description: Character may cast spells by replacing the incant with the word Magic. Still subject to all other normal casting requirements.

name: Minimize
description: Character may reduce the duration of an effect to a 3 second count.

name: Natural Armor
description: Character has armor that does not have to be physically represented. Does not stack with any other armor source

name: Vital
description: Vital damage cannot be blocked by weapons or shields.

name: Possession
description: Acts as per [[Enslavement]]

name: Rebound
description: The Rebound ability will specify a delivery type, specific effect, or list of effects for which it can defend against. Upon being hit by a matching ability, the character negates the incoming effect, and then may immediately deliver an effect of the outgoing type and effect. Ex: Magic Rebound Magic Fear allows a character who is hit by any Magic, Spell, or Spell Strike effect to negate that effect and immediately deliver a single "Magic Fear" packet-delivered effect.

name: Reduced from
description: Character takes half damage from the specified type or effect, rounded up. This does not stack with any other damage reduction ability. (If a character has Reduced from Normal and Reduced from Flame and suffers a "10 Normal Flame" attack, they will take 5 damage.)

name: Regenerate
description: Target must concentrate for 60 seconds, then is restored to max body.

name: Revive
description: Unless target was affected by within 20 seconds of becoming Dead, or was Killing Blowed at any time by , then at 59 seconds of Death count, instead of dissipating, the player announces "Revive" and is affected as per a Life spell.

name: Rift
description: Character teleports to a location specified by the caster. Character must have been physically present in the location previously. Character must move directly to their destination and Rift In immediately upon arrival.

name: Rip Free
description: Character may escape Entangle effects on a 3-count.

name: Spirit Bottle
description: At 0 body, the character crumbles and seeks [[Resurrection]]. If their bottle has charges left, they may consume a charge to reform at their Spirit Bottle.

name: Suicide
description: Allows creature to die and dissipate at will regardless of other status effects.

name: Voice Control
description: Target is compelled to follow any instructions given by character

name: Dodge
description: Active defense that may be used as though it were a Resist Toxin, Resist Magic, or Resist Physical.

name: Doom
description: Deals X damage to a target. Requires 2 relevant active defenses to defend against.

name: Enervate
description: While under the effect of an enervate, a character that is reduced to -1 body immediately dies and requires a Life effect

name: Mummy Curse
description: Target immediately dissipates and seeks resurrection.

name: Resist <Type|Effect>
description: Allows the character to negate an effect of the specified delivery type or the specified effect. Takes a Defense Slot.

name: Spell Strike
description: Character may deliver a spell with a physical weapon.

name: Berserk
description: Target feels compelled to attack the closest visible target for the duration. A character may not retreat while affected by Berserk. A character cannot activate an item, single use effect, any skill or effect that is not renewed with a rest, or use any consumable items (potions, runes, etc.). Non-consumable items like weapons can still be used.

name: Concentration
description: Character is unable to communicate, use skills, items, abilities, hold a shield, or move faster than walk for duration of effect. Concentration breaks upon taking damage.

name: Curse
description: Target takes double damage from weapons.

name: Curse Of Transformation
description: Target becomes X creature and is given stats and directions by Marshal or caster upon. Removal methods vary.
verbal: Killing Blow 1, 2, 3, Curse of Transformation X

name: Drain
description: Target is skilless. Target may not make active use of skills, granted or purchased. All instances of Drain last 5 minutes.

name: Engulf
description: Target and possessions are eaten and target must stand to side OOC. Target is reduced to -1 body and takes BLEED OUT status. Target is released upon death of creature.

name: Enslavement
description: Target is compelled to follow any instructions given by character. Target is not Aware they are Enslaved.

name: Vertigo
description: The target is unable to remain standing, cannot use any in game skills, and can do no more than slowly crawl and speak due to intense vertigo for 1 minute.
